creator: dev@submerge.ch
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #29)

You need to have mesa-devel with debug symbols _installed_ to get a meaningful stacktrace. Unless I'm misinterpreting what you are doing.

> For now, I'm back to SDDM and Plasma with neither mesa-dri nor mesa-devel.

Didn't know that this works, what does kinfocenter say about the graphics? I suppose it's in some kind of framebuffer mode then?
